title: Response ↔ Impact Pairing — Responses (synthetic)
description: **Synthetic illustrative fixture — not a real source dataset.** This collection holds the Response half of a worked Response ↔ Impact pairing that anchors the [Response ↔ Impact Boundary Rules](https://github.com/IFRCGo/monty-stac-extension/blob/main/docs/model/response-impact-boundary.md) document. It demonstrates pattern **P4** (multi-thematic split): a single `eo-gra`-shaped Response product from which one Impact item per thematic class is derived. All identifiers (`EMSR-DEMO-001`, …) are obvious placeholders. The paired Impact items live in the sibling `response-impact-pairing-impacts` collection and link back via `rel: derived_from` and a shared `monty:corr_id`.
